info.name: Urban Farming Platform — Complete Test Suite
info.description:
Full API test suite for the Interactive Urban Farming Platform.

**Setup:** Run the '0. Setup & Seed' folder first — it registers and logs in all three roles (Admin, Vendor, Customer) and saves tokens + IDs automatically.

**Folders:** Auth · Vendors · Produce · Orders · Rentals · Certifications · Forum · Plant Tracking · Admin · Security & Edge Cases

**Variables auto-set:** adminToken, vendorToken, customerToken, vendorProfileId, produceId, orderId, rentalId, certId, postId, plantId, userId

item.name: 0. Setup — Register & Login All Roles
item.description: Run this folder first. Registers Vendor + Customer, logs in all three roles, saves tokens automatically.

request.description: NOTE: ADMIN role is blocked at register. Manually seed admin or update DB directly. This will return 400.

exec: pm.test("Admin already exists - OK for re-run", () => pm.response.to.have.status(409));
// Handle both fresh register (201) and already exists (409)
pm.test("Vendor already exists - OK for re-run", () => pm.response.to.have.status(409));
console.log("Vendor already registered. Login will still work with vendor@test.com / 123456");
pm.test("Customer already exists - OK for re-run", () => pm.response.to.have.status(409));

request.description: Assumes admin was seeded via seed.js. Token saved to adminToken.

item.name: Get My Vendor Profile — no token (401)
Get All Produce — public, no auth (200)
Get All Produce — filter by category
Get Produce By ID — not found (404)

request.description: Deletes the produce. Re-create it using 'Create Produce' if needed for order tests.
produceId is set from the pre-step above

item.name: Get All Rental Spaces — public, no auth (200)
Get Rental Spaces — filter by location
Get Rental Spaces — unknown location returns empty
[Pre] Submit Another Cert for Reject Test
Get All Posts — public, no auth (200)
Delete Post — admin can delete any post (200)
Get Plant By ID — not found (404)
Get User By ID — not found (404)
Update User Status — cannot change admin (403)

request.description: Assumes admin has ID=1 from seed

exec: pm.test('403 Forbidden (admin cannot be modified)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));

request.description: produce/:id is public — should return 200 with no token
Run this 11+ times quickly. After 10 requests in 15 min the 11th should return 429.
Run 11+ times quickly to trigger 429 on login.
Checks Swagger UI is served at /api/docs

item.name: Cross-role: Customer cannot delete another user's post

request.description: Post ID 1 belongs to another user seeded in DB. Should return 403.

item.name: Cross-role: Vendor cannot access customer plant
